tx_hash.description: Off-chain metadata of a proposal with a specific transaction hash

cert_index.description: Off-chain metadata of a proposal with a specific transaction cert_index

min_fee_a.description: The linear factor for the minimum fee calculation for given epoch

min_fee_b.description: The constant factor for the minimum fee calculation

max_block_size.description: Maximum block body size in Bytes

key_deposit.description: The amount of a key registration deposit in Lovelaces

pool_deposit.description: The amount of a pool registration deposit in Lovelaces

decentralisation_param.description: Percentage of blocks produced by federated nodes

min_pool_cost.description: Minimum stake cost forced on the pool

cost_models.description: Cost models parameters for Plutus Core scripts in raw list form

price_mem.description: The per word cost of script memory usage

price_step.description: The cost of script execution step usage

max_tx_ex_mem.description: The maximum number of execution memory allowed to be used in a single transaction

max_tx_ex_steps.description: The maximum number of execution steps allowed to be used in a single transaction

max_block_ex_mem.description: The maximum number of execution memory allowed to be used in a single block

max_block_ex_steps.description: The maximum number of execution steps allowed to be used in a single block

collateral_percent.description: The percentage of the transactions fee which must be provided as collateral when including non-native scripts

max_collateral_inputs.description: The maximum number of collateral inputs allowed in a transaction

coins_per_utxo_size.description: Cost per UTxO word for Alonzo. Cost per UTxO byte for Babbage and later.

coins_per_utxo_word.description: Cost per UTxO word for Alonzo. Cost per UTxO byte for Babbage and later.

pvt_motion_no_confidence.description: Pool Voting threshold for motion of no-confidence. New in 13.2-Conway.

pvt_committee_normal.description: Pool Voting threshold for new committee/threshold (normal state). New in 13.2-Conway.

pvt_committee_no_confidence.description: Pool Voting threshold for new committee/threshold (state of no-confidence). New in 13.2-Conway.

pvt_hard_fork_initiation.description: Pool Voting threshold for hard-fork initiation. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_motion_no_confidence.description: DRep Vote threshold for motion of no-confidence. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_committee_normal.description: DRep Vote threshold for new committee/threshold (normal state). New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_committee_no_confidence.description: DRep Vote threshold for new committee/threshold (state of no-confidence). New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_update_to_constitution.description: DRep Vote threshold for update to the Constitution. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_hard_fork_initiation.description: DRep Vote threshold for hard-fork initiation. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_p_p_network_group.description: DRep Vote threshold for protocol parameter changes, network group. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_p_p_economic_group.description: DRep Vote threshold for protocol parameter changes, economic group. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_p_p_technical_group.description: DRep Vote threshold for protocol parameter changes, technical group. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_p_p_gov_group.description: DRep Vote threshold for protocol parameter changes, governance group. New in 13.2-Conway.

dvt_treasury_withdrawal.description: DRep Vote threshold for treasury withdrawal. New in 13.2-Conway.

committee_min_size.description: Minimal constitutional committee size. New in 13.2-Conway.

committee_max_term_length.description: Constitutional committee term limits. New in 13.2-Conway.

pvtpp_security_group.description: Pool Voting threshold for security-relevant protocol parameters changes. Renamed to pvt_p_p_security_group.

pvt_p_p_security_group.description: Pool Voting threshold for security-relevant protocol parameters changes.
